raw_text: alejandro jiménez flores m.sc. candidate aeronautical engineering i'm an aeronautical engineer currently finishing my master's degree in aeronautical engineering oriented in flight dynamics. i'm passionate about all related to control systems and flight dynamics. looking to take the next step in my career in the aeronautical industry field. education m.sc. aeronautical engineering with orientation in flight dynamics center of research and innovation in aeronautical engineering (fime - present) designed and constructed a fpv quadrotor from scratch. such quadrotor is currently under research carrying out experimental tests in order to develop and employ controllers and intelligent algorithms. low-cost drone testing bench (01/2022 - 07/2022) 9 designed and fabricated a testing bench capable of measuring forces and moments exerted by a uav on its three spatial directions. the testing bench is intended to replace high-cost sensors and aid in uav's research. uav conceptual design software (01/2020 - 04/2020) development of an interactive software for the conceptual design process of uav aircraft, planned to facilitate this stage of the whole uav's design process. aerodynamic and structural analysis of a uav prototype for the sae aero design competition (08/2018 -
